mapper.sql: id, orderno, openid, phone, name, cph, qcpp, status, desc, deptid, lng, lat, fixloss, address, claimImg, modifytime, createtime,rescueFeeSettleType,personHurts,goodsHurts,rebate_for_emp as rebateForEmp,rebate_for_company as rebateForCompany , cjh, payBillNo,payBillNoForClaim,accType,promise,rescue,rescueFee,insurAccess,detailImg,preFee,settleType,hasException

a.id, a.orderno, a.openid, a.phone, a.name, a.cph, a.qcpp, a.status, a.desc, a.deptid, a.lng, a.lat, a.fixloss,a.detailImg,a.preFee,a.rescueFeeSettleType,a.settleType,a.personHurts,a.goodsHurts,a.rebate_for_emp as rebateForEmp,a.rebate_for_company as rebateForCompany, a.address, a.claimImg, a.modifytime, a.createtime, a.cjh, a.payBillNo,payBillNoForClaim,a.accType,a.promise,a.rescue,a.rescueFee,a.insurAccess,a.insurer,a.hasException, b.fullname, c.phone as claimerPhone,d.bankcard, d.bankUserName, d.bankName, d.bankSecondName, d.idcard, b.synopsis

a.id, a.orderno, a.openid, a.phone, a.name, a.cph, a.qcpp, a.status, a.desc, a.deptid, a.lng, a.lat, a.fixloss,a.detailImg,a.preFee,a.rescueFeeSettleType,a.settleType,a.personHurts,a.goodsHurts,a.rebate_for_emp as rebateForEmp,a.rebate_for_company as rebateForCompany, a.address, a.claimImg, a.modifytime, a.createtime, a.cjh, a.payBillNo,payBillNoForClaim,a.accType,a.promise,a.rescue,a.rescueFee,a.insurAccess,a.insurer,a.hasException, b.fullname, c.phone as claimerPhone, b.synopsis
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) AS CONUM,t.status AS STATUS from biz_open_claim t where t.deptid=#{deptid} group by t.status
SELECT sum(rebate_for_emp) FROM biz_open_claim WHERE openid = #{openid}
SELECT sum(rebate_for_emp) FROM biz_open_claim WHERE claimer = #{account}
select count(1) from biz_open_claim t1 where to_days(t1.createTime) = to_days(now()) and t1.status = #{status}
mapper.update: update biz_open_claim t set t.status=#{status} where t.id=#{id}
